title: Add Markdown export for structured Product Signal Reports
objective: Let the UI copy a deterministic Markdown export for structured Product Signal Reports while preserving verdict-style fallback behavior for compatibility jobs.

include: Add a pure report Markdown formatter.
Add a clipboard helper for browser copy behavior.
Show Copy Markdown only for structured report jobs.
Show short success and failure copy feedback.
Add focused formatter and UI tests.
Update README and AI delivery state.
exclude: Markdown export for verdict-only fallback jobs.

done: Structured report jobs show a Copy Markdown action.
Verdict-only fallback jobs do not show Markdown export.
Markdown is assembled in the UI from job.report with deterministic formatting.
Copy success and failure states are shown in the UI.
No API or extension repo files were changed.
npm run build and npm test -- --run pass.
AI delivery state and verification records were updated.
